Rule 26. Method of authentication

(1) Every return shall be authenticated electronically.

Provided that the Commissioner may exempt a person from electronic filing [4].

[4] Omitted vide Notification No. 14/2022-Central Tax, dated 05.07.2022, w.e.f. 05.07.2022; inserted vide Notification No. 18/2020-Central Tax, dated 23.03.2020.
